---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't currently?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Mockups, examples, or references that might help.
